title: Google renames NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook and adds a cloud computer
friendlyTitle: NotebookLM is now called Gemini Notebook
summary: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook while keeping it as a standalone research product. The update brings deeper links to the Gemini app and Search, and adds a secure cloud computer for running code inside notebooks, with broader rollout planned for Pro users.
friendlySummary: Google renamed NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook. It is still a research tool, but it will work more closely with Gemini and Search and can run code in a secure cloud computer.
whyItMatters: The change makes research notebooks more connected to the rest of Google’s AI tools, which may reduce context-switching for analysis and learning. It also raises the usual practical questions about where source materials, code and account-linked context are processed.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This can make it easier to research, learn and analyse information in one place. It is still worth checking where your notes and data are being used.
